ops.title: cc-guides redesign: CI-owned rendering + fleet shim migration
ops.description:
User-directed from-scratch redesign of the cc-guides CI surface (approved plan: ruff-cleaned-gleaming-wind). CI becomes the only writer of rendered artifacts; fragments are the sole editable surface; agents never run `cc-guides render` locally (only repo-creation flows — repo-bootstrap scaffold, settings-onboard — keep a local render).

Architecture: one dual-mode reusable workflow `yasyf/cc-guides/.github/workflows/guides.yml` (workflow_call + its own direct triggers) consumed at `@main`; consumers carry a never-changing ~14-line shim. push/cron/dispatch → `ci-render` (deploy-key push, idempotent); pull_request → new `pr-check` contract check (fail iff PR touches lock-listed artifacts or the lock; fragment-only PRs pass). Deleted: locked-binary-version resolution, errVersionSkew/errUnreleasedLockVersion, root action.yml, re-render.yml, and (post-sweep) the action-v1* tags. Marker text changes to "edit the fragments and push — CI renders"; MarkerCoreRegex accepts old+new cores, emits new.

Phases: 1 rebuild cc-guides (in flight, opus lane at /tmp/cc-guides-redesign + fable README rewrite + sol finder/refuter review; release auto-cuts on push to main) · 2 canary cc-skills (all four event routes observed live) · 3 fleet sweep (repos_with_file discovery, compare-first shim replacement, divergents flagged; discovery lane in flight) · 4 delete action-v1 tags + reword cc-skills docs (pack README:29, settings-onboard.js:35 stale claim, repo-bootstrap SKILL/reference render mentions; bump repo-bootstrap plugin) · 5 memory + cc-notes records.

ops.text: Fragment-only push to a consumer lands a bot 'chore: re-render guides' commit within minutes, no local render involved
PR hand-editing a rendered artifact goes red naming the owning .claude/fragments/<target>/ dir; fragment-only PR passes
Every repos_with_file consumer carries the byte-identical @main shim and its latest guides.yml run is green; divergents resolved or explicitly deferred
cc-guides main has no action.yml / re-render.yml / version-skew machinery; action-v1* tags deleted post-sweep; task ci green
cc-skills rg 'cc-guides render' hits only scaffold/onboarding exception sites; cc-guides README rewritten to the CI-owned story
